title: Brazilian Rye Ceviche
description: A refreshing Brazilian-inspired ceviche dish made with raw rye fish, rustic tomatoes, and spices. Enjoy as a light and zesty snack or appetizer.
instructions: Cut the rye fish into small pieces and place in a shallow dish.
Chop the rustic tomatoes, red onion, and fresh cilantro.
Add the chopped vegetables to the dish with the fish.
Squeeze the lime juice over the top of the fish and vegetables.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Cover the dish with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the fish to 'cook' in the lime juice.
Just before serving, stir the ceviche gently to distribute the flavors.
Serve the ceviche immediately, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.

Note: Raw rye fish can be a risk for foodborne illness if not handled properly. Ensure that all utensils, cutting boards, and plates are thoroughly cleaned and sanitized before preparing and serving the ceviche.
